subcodes.first_line: How wondrous the breeze of reunion that hath wafted, and the fragrance of meeting that hath been diffused, in this hour when five hours remain until sunset [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حبذا نسیم وصال وزید و عرف لقا در این حین که پنج ساعت بغروب مانده متضوع گشت
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @the power of words; of speech, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @light and darkness, @spiritual transformation
